description: Canonical condition taxonomy for the PetCare dermatology triage model. Persisted records and model outputs MUST use the canonical `id`. Display strings are for UI localization only and match the strings already rendered by PetCare-Web (src/lib/mock-data.ts).

labels.notes: Zoonotic (transmissible to humans); triage should not under-escalate.
Can be serious; deep pyoderma warrants prompt veterinary care.
Not a model output class; assigned when the result is low-confidence, out-of-distribution, or invalid.
